idea: Starting persistent 1p2c FP16->FP32 kernel adapted to K=16416; established first custom kernel baseline at 181.49T (44.3% of cuBLAS 409.87T)
Switch 1p2c→1p1c WN=256 STAGES=2 TILE_M=64: reduces SMEM from 196KB to 144KB, fewer warp-groups, less register pressure → +15% to 209T
Switch persistent 114-CTA → non-persistent 16705-CTA (TILE_M=64, WN=256, STAGES=3): full GPU parallelism instead of serialized tile scheduling → +27% to 266T (64.8% cuBLAS)
